Cannot be used as Fusion Material. Your opponent cannot target this card with card effects. You can only use each of the following effects of "Albion the Sanctifire Dragon" once per turn. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can target 2 monsters in any GY(s); Special Summon both monsters, 1 to each field. If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 4 monsters, the 2 in the Extra Monster Zones and the 2 in the center Main Monster Zones, and if you do, Special Summon this card.
translatedEffectText: "Fallen of Albaz" + 1 光属性 Spellcaster 怪兽 Cannot be used as Fusion Material。 对手 不能作为对象 this card with card effects。 你可以 only use each of the following effects of "Albion the Sanctifire Dragon" 1 回合 1 次。 对手回合中 (快速效果)： 你可以 target 2 怪兽 in any 墓地(s)； 特殊召唤 both 怪兽， 1 to each field。 If this card is in your 墓地： 你可以 Tribute 4 怪兽， the 2 in the Extra 怪兽 Zones and the 2 in the center Main 怪兽 Zones， and if you do， 将这张卡特殊召唤。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；效果与墓地资源有关；发动时需要选择目标；自身不容易被效果处理。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。

name: Albion the Shrouded Dragon
effectText:
This card's name becomes "Fallen of Albaz" while on the field or in the GY. If this card is in your hand or GY: You can send 1 "Fallen of Albaz" or 1 "Branded" Spell/Trap from your hand or Deck to the GY; apply the following effect based on where you sent it from.
● Hand: Special Summon this card.
● Deck: Place this card on the bottom of the Deck, then, if you placed this card from your hand, draw 1 card.
You can only use this effect of "Albion the Shrouded Dragon" once per turn.
translatedEffectText: This card's name becomes "Fallen of Albaz" while 场上 or in the 墓地。 If this card is in 你的手牌 or 墓地： 你可以 send 1 "Fallen of Albaz" or 1 "Branded" Spell/Trap 从手牌或卡组 to the 墓地； apply the following effect based on where you sent it from。 ● Hand： 将这张卡特殊召唤。 ● 卡组： Place this card on the bottom of the 卡组， then， if you placed this card from 你的手牌， 抽 1 张卡。 这个效果每回合只能使用 1 次： "Albion the Shrouded Dragon" 1 回合 1 次。
childFriendlySummary: 效果重点：可以特殊召唤怪兽；可以从卡组把怪兽送去墓地；可以补充手牌；效果与墓地资源有关。
recommendedUsage: 推荐在需要补充场面、延续展开，或把关键怪兽重新利用时使用。
synergyNotes: 适合与墓地利用、复活展开，或需要反复回收怪兽资源的卡配合。
